name: Quick Dial - 呲啦起始页
description: 极简无广告浏览器新标签页，支持自定义导航、多引擎搜索、天气农历、壁纸主题。替代原生标签页的最佳选择。
author: Quick Dial

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://rescdn.apihz.cn https://images.xxapi.cn https: data:; connect-src 'self' https://api.ruseo.cn https://sync.ruseo.cn https://picsum.photos https://rescdn.apihz.cn https://images.xxapi.cn
